LanguageData.NJA_Settings_ForceFinishUnfinishedFirst_: Force-finish unfinished items before starting new crafts
When enabled, pawns will finish any existing unfinished item matching a recipe before starting a brand-new craft of that type.
LanguageData.NJA_Settings_EnableFinishItCompat_Toolti: When enabled, the Finish It! gizmo is rerouted through a compatibility shim so it can still assign a pawn even though No Job Authors suppresses creator ownership.
LanguageData.NJA_Settings_EnableAchtungCompat_Tooltip: When enabled, unfinished items already targeted by another pawn's Achtung! forced job are skipped to reduce forced-job stealing.
LanguageData.NJA_Settings_EnableLifeLessonsCompat_Too: When enabled, debug builds log Life Lessons proficiency checks on unfinished-bill paths.
LanguageData.NJA_Settings_EnableVpeCompat_Tooltip: When enabled, debug builds log VPE Craft Timeskip interactions with unfinished items.
LanguageData.NJA_Settings_OnlyApplyToNonQualityItems_: When enabled, quality-sensitive recipes keep vanilla author/worker behavior.
LanguageData.NJA_Settings_PreventUnfinishedInStockpil: When enabled, storage buildings reject unfinished items going forward. This does not automatically uncheck any existing storage filter entries; use the button below to clean those up.
LanguageData.NJA_Settings_RemoveUnfinishedFromStockpi: Updated {0} storage filters to disallow unfinished items.
